task: Follow-up to GAP-EXPENSES Phase 1.5 (#1008): add the bill-branch regression guard GUARD's checklist item (d) flagged as missing. Test-only, no schema/runtime change. apps/backend/src/maintenance/__tests__/two-section-bill-write.test.ts drives the real bill path (autoCreateBillFromWO -> copyToAccountingLines '-> accounting.bill_lines') with a mock client and asserts the bill write is unchanged by Phase 1.5: bill_lines INSERT writes the dollar `amount` column NOT amount_cents, keeps its account-resolution columns (category_kind/category_code/account_id), and the Phase-1.5 expense-only additions (total_amount_cents reconciliation; expense_lines INSERT) do NOT run on the bill path. Closes the coverage gap so a future writer regression leaking the cents treatment into bills is caught.
